summary: Security hardening tests completed. Backend: 13/13 tests PASSED. Frontend: All features verified - Login works, Admin dashboard tabs (Subscriptions, Verifications, Analytics) all functional, Settings page loads with 6 subscription tiers.

issues: Console warnings about recharts chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly
React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key /admin' - cosmetic issue

passed_tests: Security Headers: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff present
Security Headers: X-Frame-Options: DENY present
Security Headers: X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block present
Security Headers: Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin present
Security Headers: Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(self), geolocation=() present
Security Headers: Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) max-age=31536000 present
Security Headers present on login endpoint responses
Security Headers present on error responses
Dev-login works for admin user (admin@carryon.com)
Dev-login returns 403 Forbidden for non-admin user (founder@carryon.us)
Dev-login returns 401 for invalid credentials
Regular login works for admin user
Regular login works for non-admin user (founder@carryon.us)
Rate limiting: endpoint configured for 20 requests/60s (may be overridden by K8s ingress in preview)
Subscription status endpoint works after security changes
Plans endpoint returns 6 main tiers + 4 beneficiary tiers
Analytics digest preview endpoint works for admin
Admin verifications endpoint accessible
Frontend login flow works end-to-end (no CORS issues)
Admin dashboard loads with all tabs: All Users, Transition Verification, DTS Management, Customer Support, Subscriptions, Verifications, Analytics, Activity Log, Dev Switcher
Subscriptions tab shows Beta Mode toggle, Family Plan toggle, Plan Pricing, User Subscription Overrides
Verifications tab shows Tier Verification Requests

Analytics tab shows MRR ($0.00), Trial Conversion (0%), Churn Rate (0%), Active Trials (19), Active Subs (0), Pending Reviews (1), Signups chart, Trial Funnel, Tier Distribution, Monthly Revenue by Tier
Settings page loads with 6 subscription plans: Premium ($9.99), Standard ($8.99), Base ($7.99), New Adult ($3.99), Military/First Responder ($5.99), Hospice (Free)
critical_code_review_comments: SecurityHeadersMiddleware correctly adds all 6 security headers to every response
RateLimitMiddleware configured for 20 requests/60s on auth endpoints (/api/auth/login, /api/auth/register, /api/auth/dev-login, /api/auth/verify-otp)
Dev-login properly restricted to admin role only with 403 response for non-admin users
CORS origins properly configured with production URLs (app.carryon.us, carryon.us, www.carryon.us) plus localhost for development
FRONTEND_URL from env var automatically added to CORS origins for preview environments
Rate limiting uses in-memory tracking (defaultdict) - appropriate for single-instance deployment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security hardening iteration 25 complete. All 6 security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, HSTS) verified. Dev-login restricted to admin role (403 for non-admin). Rate limiting configured (20 req/60s on auth endpoints). CORS tightened. App URL: https://vault-admin-metrics.preview.emergentagent.com. Beta mode is ON.

rate_limiting.note: May be overridden by K8s ingress in preview environment
